sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timing (id UInt32, duration String, data Nullable(Int32));
SELECT parseTimeDelta(duration) AS delta, id FROM test_timing WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, parseTimeDelta(duration) AS delta FROM test_timing WHERE delta = 1320.0;
SELECT id, parseTimeDelta(duration) AS delta FROM test_timing WHERE delta IS NULL;
SELECT id FROM test_timing WHERE parseTimeDelta(duration) = (SELECT parseTimeDelta('5yr3mo') - parseTimeDelta('1yr2mo'));
SELECT id, parseTimeDelta(duration) AS delta FROM test_timing GROUP BY id, delta HAVING delta > 600;
SELECT id, (SELECT COUNT() FROM test_timing WHERE data IS NOT NULL) AS non_null_count, parseTimeDelta(duration) AS delta FROM test_timing WHERE delta IS NOT NULL ORDER BY delta DESC;
CREATE TABLE temp_timing (id UInt32, duration String);
SELECT id FROM temp_timing WHERE parseTimeDelta(duration) < (SELECT parseTimeDelta('3d') + parseTimeDelta('1min')) AND duration != '';
SELECT id, parseTimeDelta('1s+1000ms+1000us') AS total_delta FROM temp_timing WHERE parseTimeDelta(duration) = total_delta;
CREATE TABLE join_test (id UInt32, duration String, ref_id UInt32);
SELECT jt.id AS join_id, jt.duration, tt.id AS test_id FROM join_test jt JOIN test_timing tt ON parseTimeDelta(jt.duration) = tt.data;
SELECT id FROM test_timing WHERE id IN (SELECT ref_id FROM join_test WHERE parseTimeDelta(duration) IS NOT NULL);
